name: procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-50 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-50 vendor contracts/month, inconsistent vendor performance causes late deliveries and quality issues. We provide a vendor performance dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
